argument_units.text: Lol Hillary is so fucked now. These guys are so much more competent than here. Painfully obvious after tonight.
Not really, a lot of them radiate huge alpha confidence. They would eat clinton for breakfast. Clinton may have better plans etc. but you have to hand to the republicans they are a confident bunch.
Without her screwing up, that is.
If by competent, you mean they're like a 3 year old trying to understand calculus, then yes.
Fox New is hosting this? ...Are they even pretending to hide their bias anymore?
The whole political process is corporate shit now.
They've actually been (perhaps surprisingly) really balanced so far and are asking a lot of relatively tough questions, as opposed to the usual agenda pushing.
MSNBC will host the Democratic one. It goes both ways.
They're like "Bush, question for you, Hillary, total bitch right"
Cost of solar is less expensive than coal.
If we invested 10 percent of our GDP into that we will be entirely solar by 2025.
Invested 10 percent? Are you nuts?
I know that's a lot but free energy was my point.
You realize how much 20 percent of GDP is exactly?
Wow lol yes I do. I said 10 percent and that was based on current energy use and current solar technology.
I just wanted to point it that it's less expensive to make solar plants than coal ones.
They call me Jeb. Because I earned it.
He's saying he's not riding on his families success.
I understood it just fine.
Sounds like you don't understand how rhetoric works...
Hes trying to say he earned familiarity with his 'stituents.
I think he's referring to the fact that no one is giving him credit just for being a bush.

The question was about what separates him from his brother. What he was trying to articulate (not so eloquently) is that in Florida, he's earned the right to not be lumped in the same category as his brother.
Cheering for Hillary is fine, but admonishment for cheering for Trump.
That wasn't biased. Don't be sensitive.
She dissed him earlier during the first part and got cheers and laughs. There was no comment about it.
So is this a place where I can go to see unbiased commenting?
not the live thread man
Actual discussion in a reddit live thread? Bruh...
You won't find that on Reddit, unfortunately. Not while it's live at least.
All your going to find is knee jerk reactions. Won't be until people are able to digest what was said before an actual conversation can take place.
No, not at all. Find somewhere else if you want unbiased comments.

This is bad. Hillary will lose.

All I am saying is it isn't a tipping point issue.

I swear she thinks tax returns outweigh classified emails on a personal server.
Nice job keeping this impartial guys.
To be fair, Clinton's name has come up a lot

tears up the deal day one, add more sanctions, and just convince our allies to do the same thing. like we can play some jedi mind tricks on our allies to get them to do our bidding.

Not the cost, but kind of "experience equivalent"
I think he means it's equivalent worth.
He means everyone should be able to go to college
I'm assuming he meant value.
He said that a college degree today provides the same opportunities as a high school degree did 50 years ago.

i think he said College today is the equivalent of high school 50 years ago, 50 years ago finishing high was seen as the standard of education and was somewhat "expected" of people. Nowadays college is seen as that standard.
I think he meant "value", not cost
He said that a college degree is as important to your future today as the high school diploma was 50 years ago.
Equivalent. Like you have about the same economic outcomes
I think he meant in terms of what the degrees means to employers. A college degree today is worth what a high school degree was worth decades ago.

I hope the next hour changes that. I want to see a factual Hillary going in, not this one that is trying to be the High School president by talking over others and barely saying anyting other than empty promises
she's staying above the noise, which is all she has to do with a 30% lead in the polls
Same reason she's getting tons of cheers for literally NO REASON. People just want to be a part of history in getting the first woman elected president
what? Sanders has just been full of platitudes with no specifics. If anything, Hillary actually has specifics, names names, etc.
Honestly, when Trump starts talking I can not follow what the hell he is saying. His words don't translate to any coherent idea in my head. He just makes me confused.
You slow?
My philosophy is basically this. And this is something that I live by. And I always have. And I always will. Don't ever, for any reason, do anything to anyone, for any reason, ever, no matter what.

why doesn't bernie ever talk about trade schools or community college? Not everybody should go to college!
By having the Government pay for college education they have massively increased bargaining power with the universities and can lower rates.
Education inflation is mostly caused by administrative bloat and insufficient public funding.

that's what you're doing though. 'the levant' includes israel. if you want to come up with a better name than isis that more accurately represents the territory they cover, great. that doesn't mean that ISIL is a good name.

Webb does have a semi-decent point about affirmative action.
There is a uniquely horrifying experience with uniquely horrifying history that has effects to this day on the African American population.
But let's not pretend that Latin-American immigrants aren't often at a severely disadvantaged position as well.
Affirmative action is an evil; it is, at its heart, a kind of discrimination/bias.

what a lot of (usually white, middle class) people don't realize is that it's a necessary evil that is in specific recompense for the conditions that we deliberately created for black people in our country.
The conditions for latinos in this country is half-intentional and half-incidental to how the US developed in relation to Mexico.
Moreover, the solutions to the problems and the exact kinds of problems faced by the two (broad/vague) ethnicities are, to a fair extent, different in nature and origin.
The solution of education is the better solution for the demographic that already largely resides in the US (black persons), while a more immediate solution for latinos would be immigration reform.

It doesn't look good for Russia to fight back and escalate against a no fly zone though.

argument_units.text: it was a defensive allaince agains the Soviet Union. in present day, it's a defensive alliance. it takes a lot to get it involved in actual War. to get it involved against terriosim would take a lot of effort, and go against why it was created.

The Russian's strategic bomber is as old as ours.
I fail to see what relevance this has to anything.
The B-52H airframe has a ~35,000 flight hour service life.
We keep sufficient aircraft in reserve to support B-52H operations past 2040, by which point the B-21 will be operational.
B-52H avionics sustainment is ongoing, including $110M in 2000 and $750M in 2009.
Basically, the aircraft will be mission-ready for at least another 24 years -- long enough that its replacement will be ready.

These papers delay with operations against Al-Qaeda, and unfortunately Al-Qaeda was able to look at these papers and operations that were supposed to be redacted.
